preservedBehaviors.description: Stats API uses RANGE_TO_INTERVAL lookup table for time range parsing
Stats API uses shared timeClause variable for all query filters
Stats API returns 8+ data sections including requestsOverTime, latencyOverTime, tokensOverTime, summary, sources, feedback, recentActivity, requestsLast24h
Dashboard page uses useCallback for xTickFormatter
Dashboard displays 4 stat cards: Requests, Success rate, Avg latency, Token volume
Dashboard has area chart, pie charts, bar chart, and recent activity table
Dashboard has link to Audit Log at /query-history
Stats API enforces role-based access with requireAnyRole
